name: Storage of File with Sensitive Data Under Web Root
description: The product stores sensitive data (configuration files, database exports, credentials) under the web document root with insufficient access control, making it directly accessible to untrusted parties via HTTP requests.
detection_pattern: Look for STORAGE nodes (file write operations) placing sensitive data in paths under an EXTERNAL node (web root directory, public_html, wwwroot) without an AUTH node (access control rules, .htaccess deny, web server config restriction) that prevents direct HTTP access to the sensitive file.
